name: Grade 12 Language Arts — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 12 pathway for independent publication, portfolio curation, reflection, and career-ready communication. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 12 knowledge and transferable skills in independent publication, portfolio curation, reflection, and career-ready communication.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
